The '''''Happy Dagger''''' was a [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|Personal Luxury Yacht 3000]] owned by [[Roa]], an old [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] friend of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was modified to be even more luxurious while also having more firepower then a standard PLY-3000. Han Solo accompanied Roa in his ship while tracking [[Reck Desh]] in the early [[Standard month/Legends|months]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Roa modified this luxury yacht by installing furniture-grade [[uwa]] [[Wood/Legends|wood]] from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] on almost every walkway and bulkhead. Spaces that were not furnished with the wood were made to look as though they were. The ''Happy Dagger'' also sported an acceleration couch which Roa had upholstered in [[crosh-hide]] and [[Shimmersilk/Legends|shimmersilk]]. It was abandoned after a failed [[Yuuzhan Vong]] attack on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
